records.claimHeadline: Production-grade agent governance is fully live.
records.claimedState: Policy bundles, eval gates, and approval trails are active across every agent lane.
records.observedState: Pilot-only policybundle coverage with manual review and no production gate on two high-impact agent lanes.
records.buyerImpact: Board memo overstates readiness and underprices remediation.

records.claimHeadline: The finance stack is already delivering six-figure margin savings.
records.claimedState: Savings are measured, recurring, and attributable to current tooling decisions.
records.observedState: Unmeasured savings story still depends on manual export work and an untested replacement path for one contract.
records.buyerImpact: CFO narrative is fragile without a better replacement and savings proof packet.
